---
title: "IBO flora"
author: "Owen Webb"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Packages + Data

```{r}
#| warning: FALSE
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
inat_obs <- read_csv("~/BSU Documents/DATAR 155/observations-708046.csv/observations-708046.csv")
View(inat_obs)
```
## Taxa list
```{r}
species_list <- unique(inat_obs$scientific_name)
View(species_list)
```
```{r}
by_family <- inat_obs %>% 
  group_by(scientific_name, taxon_family_name) %>% 
  summarize()

View(by_family)

```
## Export
```{r}
#install.packages("writexl")
write.csv(by_family, file = "by_family.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
